privileged_info_summary: Task processes expense report for employee Sarah Chen with 5 expense items totaling $1420.65: Hotel ($487.50), Conference ($375.00), Airfare ($312.00), Meals ($156.75), and Transportation ($89.40). All expense amounts and employee name are hardcoded in the task setup script. Verifier uses a 2% tolerance for matching expense amounts. This is synthetic test data created programmatically for the Odoo demo environment.
